description.en: Install the preview, run a saved scene, add Python gameplay behavior, and produce a standalone Windows build.
description.zh-CN: 安装预览版、运行已保存场景、加入 Python 玩法逻辑，并生成 Windows 独立构建。

completion_summary.en: A saved scene runs a custom SpinComponent in Play mode and the packaged build launches outside the editor.
completion_summary.zh-CN: 已保存场景能在 Play 模式运行自定义 SpinComponent，打包产物也能脱离编辑器启动。

completion.en: The editor enters and exits Play mode with a saved visible scene and no repeating Console error.
completion.zh-CN: 编辑器能用已保存的可见场景进入和退出 Play 模式，Console 没有重复错误。

completion.en: SpinComponent rotates its GameObject, exposes Speed in the Inspector, and logs start once.
completion.zh-CN: SpinComponent 能旋转所属 GameObject、在 Inspector 暴露 Speed，并且只记录一次启动日志。

completion.en: A freshly extracted Windows package launches the correct scene without depending on the editor.
completion.zh-CN: 重新解压的 Windows 包无需依赖编辑器即可启动正确场景。
